title: quercus ilex var. subrevoluta
intro: Quercus ilex var. subrevoluta, also known as the Holm Oak, is a variety of the Holm Oak tree, native to the Mediterranean region and characterized by its smaller leaves with rolled-under margins. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quercus ilex var. subrevoluta include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Quercus ilex var. subrevoluta is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
